cta.title: Be Part of a New Data Economy

howItWorks.title: How Datamız Works
howItWorks.description: Datamız connects organizations and independent researchers with verified contributors for surveys and one-to-one interviews. The platform helps product teams, marketing teams, and research professionals collect reliable data, insights, and expertise directly from people who match their target audience. By bringing participant discovery, screening, and compensation into one system, Datamız makes high-quality data collection simple and dependable.

signUp.title: Sign Up & Complete Profile
signUp.description: Create your account and fill in your demographics, education, region, and interests. This helps companies find you.

browse.title: Browse Opportunities
browse.description: Explore available surveys and interviews that match your profile. See earnings before you apply.

apply.title: Apply & Complete
apply.description: Apply to opportunities you're interested in. Once approved, complete surveys or attend interviews.

getPaid.title: Get Paid
getPaid.description: Receive payment directly to your wallet. Withdraw to your bank account or mobile money anytime.

createAccount.title: Create Company Account
createAccount.description: Sign up and complete your company profile. Tell us about your organization and research needs.

defineTarget.title: Define Your Target
defineTarget.description: Set specific demographic filters: age range, region, education, occupation, and more to reach the right audience.

createSurvey.title: Create Survey or Interview
createSurvey.description: Design your questionnaire or interview guide. Set compensation rates and deadlines.

review.title: Review & Approve
review.description: Review applications from qualified contributors. Approve participants and monitor responses in real-time.

analyze.title: Analyze Results
analyze.description: Access completed responses and analytics. Export data in your preferred format for deeper analysis.

fairCompensation.title: Fair Compensation
fairCompensation.description: Contributors are paid competitive rates for their time and participation in surveys and interviews.

dataQuality.title: High Data Quality
dataQuality.description: The platform is designed to ensure reliable responses and reduce low-effort participation.

forContributors.title: Earn Money Sharing Your Opinions
forContributors.subtitle: Join thousands of local data owners who earn extra income by participating in research campaigns.

earnIncome.title: Earn Extra Income
earnIncome.description: Get paid for sharing your opinions. Earn competitive rates for surveys and interviews that match your profile.

flexible.title: Flexible Schedule
flexible.description: Work whenever you want, wherever you are. Choose opportunities that fit your availability.

secure.title: Secure & Trusted
secure.description: Your data is protected and payments are guaranteed. We ensure a safe and transparent platform.

shape.title: Shape Products & Services
shape.description: Your insights help companies build better products and services for the emerging markets.

howToEarn.title: How You Can Earn
howToEarn.subtitle: Different types of opportunities with varying time commitments and compensation

profile.title: Complete Your Profile
profile.description: Add your demographics, education, occupation, and interests. The more complete your profile, the more opportunities you'll see.

surveys.title: Surveys
surveys.description: From quick polls to detailed questionnaires. Compensation depends on the length, complexity, and other advanced factors of each survey.

interviews.title: Video Interviews
interviews.description: One-to-one or group video conversations with researchers, usually 15 minutes or longer.

eligibility.title: Who Can Join?
eligibility.subtitle: Basic requirements to become a contributor on Datamız

completeProfile.title: Complete Profile
completeProfile.description: Add your details to get matched

howMuch.question: How much can I earn?
howMuch.answer: Earnings vary based on the type and length of surveys. Active contributors can earn $50–$300+ per month.

whenPaid.question: When do I get paid?
whenPaid.answer: Payments are processed within 48 hours of completing a survey. You can withdraw once you reach $3.

howOften.question: How often are surveys available?
howOften.answer: It depends on your profile and current demand. Most contributors see new opportunities weekly.

safe.question: Is my information safe?
safe.answer: Yes! All your personal data is encrypted and we never share your identity with companies without consent.

analytics.title: Your Analytics at a Glance
analytics.subtitle: Track your earnings, performance, and opportunities in real-time

cta.title: Ready to Start Earning?
cta.subtitle: Join hundreds of local contributors and start earning shortly.

forCompanies.title: Access Quality Data from Verified Contributors
forCompanies.subtitle: Get targeted insights from real people across the region. Fast, reliable, and built for local markets.
